name: Spicy Sweet Potatoes and Apples
recipeIngredient: 4 cups orange sweet potatoes, peeled and cubed
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375.
2. In a 13x9 inch baking pan, melt light butter in the oven for 2-4 minutes.
3. Stir in all remaining ingredients except sweet potatoes and apples.
4. Place sweet potatoes in the butter mixture; toss to coat.
5. Cover; bake for 25-35 minutes, or until fork tender.
6. Stir in apples and nuts (if using).
7. Continue baking, uncovered, for 15-20 minutes, or until apples are tender, stirring once.
Makes 6 servings.
